title: Indulgent Spanish Boudin Noir Pa Amb Tomaquet
description: This dish combines the spicy richness of Spanish boudin noir with the bold flavors of pa amb tomaquet, a classic Catalan recipe. With the addition of earthenware-cooked vegetables, this indulgent meal is truly one-of-a-kind.

ingredients.name: boudin noir
ingredients.notes: made with pork blood, onions, garlic, and spices

ingredients.name: tomato
ingredients.notes: heirloom or beefsteak variety works well

ingredients.name: bread
ingredients.notes: preferably day-old bread such as baguette or ciabatta

instructions: Add the boudin noir to the fondue pot and cook for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Meanwhile, slice the tomatoes in half and remove the seeds and excess liquid.
Heat the olive oil in a separate pan over medium heat and sauté the garlic until softened.
